concepts.name: Identifying Halves
concepts.sample_question: Which of these shapes is cut exactly in half?
concepts.sample_answer: The circle with a line down the middle.

concepts.name: Fractions as parts of a whole
concepts.sample_question: If you have a chocolate bar cut into 4 equal pieces and you eat 2, what fraction did you eat?

concepts.name: Equivalent Fractions
concepts.sample_question: Why is 2/4 the same amount as 1/2?
concepts.sample_answer: Because both represent the exact same portion of the whole.

concepts.name: Adding Fractions with Like Denominators
concepts.sample_question: If you eat 1/4 of a pizza and your friend eats 2/4, how much is eaten in total?
